summary: Iteration 8 UI Redesign Testing Complete. All features verified: (1) Login page - dark blue left panel (#0B0542), 'Welcome back!' right panel, grid pattern background, blue Login button (#4A90E2), (2) Register page - 'Register' title, 'Create your Japap Messenger Account!', split layout, terms checkbox + modal working, (3) Sidebar - dark blue (#0B0542), white logo, red active nav (#E01C2E), red avatar, (4) All 5-block navigation working (Accueil, Messenger, Wallet, Services, Profil), (5) All design tokens correct (#0F056B primary, #E01C2E red/secondary). 21/21 backend tests passed. All functionality preserved after UI redesign.
critical_code_review_comments: Login Page: Dark blue left panel (#0B0542) with 'Connect with friends!' text, white right panel with 'Welcome back!', grid pattern background, blue Login button (#4A90E2)
Register Page: 'Register' title, 'Create your Japap Messenger Account!' subtitle, split layout matching doc Page 3, terms checkbox + modal with 13 sections
Sidebar: Dark blue (#0B0542) background, white inverted logo, red active nav items (#E01C2E), red avatar background
Design Tokens: --jp-primary=#0F056B, --jp-secondary=#E01C2E (JAPAP Red), --jp-red=#E01C2E all correctly set
5-Block Navigation: Accueil, Messenger, Wallet, Services, Profil all working with correct routing
Admin Dashboard: Accessible for admin users, shows statistics
Crypto Module: CoinGecko real prices working with 8 coins, XAF conversion, APY badges
Profile Page: Gradient cover working correctly
seed_data_creation: None - using existing data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 verified UI redesign matching JAPAP MESSENGER document. All colors verified: sidebar #0B0542 (dark blue), active nav #E01C2E (JAPAP Red), login button #4A90E2 (blue). Login/Register pages have split layout with dark blue left panel and white right panel with grid pattern. Terms modal working. All 5-block navigation functional. Backend unchanged - 21 tests still passing.
